zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel於1346年3月25日出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，他的父親Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel40歲，母親Eleanor of Lancaster27歲。他於1359年9月28日與Elizabeth de Bohun結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1377年登記服兵役。他去世於1397年9月21日在英國米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel于1346年3月25日出生在英国素可阿盧德爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel40岁，母亲Eleanor of Lancaster27岁。他于1359年9月28日与Elizabeth de Bohun结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1377年登记服兵役。他去世于1397年9月21日在英国米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel was born on 25 March 1346, in Arundel, Sussex, England, his father, Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel, was 40 and his mother, Eleanor of Lancaster, was 27. He married Elizabeth de Bohun on 28 September 1359. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1377. He died on 21 September 1397, in Tower of London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel est né le 25 mars 1346, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Eleanor of Lancaster, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Bohun le 28 septembre 1359. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1377. Il est décédé le 21 septembre 1397, à Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel am 25. März 1346 in Arundel, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel 40 und seine Mutter Eleanor of Lancaster 27. Er hat am 28. September 1359 Elizabeth de Bohun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1377 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 21. September 1397 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Tower of London, Middlesex, England und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel è nato il il 25 marzo 1346 nel Arundel, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor of Lancaster, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Bohun il 28 settembre 1359. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1377. Morì il 21 settembre 1397, nel Tower of London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundelが1346年3月25日にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundelは40歳，母Eleanor of Lancasterは27歳であった。1359年9月28日にElizabeth de Bohunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1377年に兵役登録をした。彼は1397年9月21日にイギリスミッドレセックストウエル オフ ロンドンで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel(이)가 1346년 3월 25일 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor of Lancaster(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1359년 9월 28일 Elizabeth de Bohun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1377년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1397년 9월 21일 영국 미들레세스 타워 프 런던에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel nasceu em 25 de março de 1346, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor of Lancaster, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Bohun em 28 de setembro de 1359. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1377. Ele faleceu em 21 de setembro de 1397, em Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard FitzAlan 11th Earl of Arundel родился 25 марта 1346 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard FitzAlan 10th Earl of Arundel было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor of Lancaster, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Bohun 28 сентября 1359 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. В 1377 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 21 сентября 1397 г. в местности тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
